name: appendSpreadsheetRows
description: Appends rows of data to the end of a sheet in a Google Spreadsheet.

spreadsheetId.description: The ID of the Google Spreadsheet (from the URL).

range.description: A1 notation range indicating where to append (e.g., "A1" or "Sheet1!A1"). Data will be appended starting from this range.

values.description: 2D array of values to append. Each inner array represents a row.

valueInputOption.description: How input data should be interpreted. RAW: values are stored as-is. USER_ENTERED: values are parsed as if typed by a user.
